pages.title: about
pages.text: Hi there 👋， I am mendax1234 A coder who is passionate about Hackintosh, Operating systems, First Robotics Competition, Lego Mindstorms EV3/NXT. ThinkPadX390-Opencore-EFI founder and core contributor. ThinkPadE40-Clover-EFI founder and core contributer. Where to find me My Blog bbs.pcbeta 51NB E-mail: mendax1234@sina.cn Tech preferences 🖥 Operating System Windows 10 & macOS(Hackintosh) You are probably also looking for… I am using Hackintosh in my leisure time, here is my EFI for ThinkPad X390. This is also my main working machine. However ,l use Windows 10 as my daily and main Operating System. I also maintain ThinkPad E40’s EFI, but I didn’t use this notebook any more, because it is too old! If you want to support me , plesase turn to Support.

posts.title: My New Post
posts.text: l just want to announce that the blog will restart from now on!

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: macOS 12 Monterey
posts.text: On WWDC 21 Apple unevils its macOS 12 and l am trying to update my hackintosh!
